en_title: The Last of Us Part 2 Multiplayer Lives On as PvP Mod Due Out Later This Year
cn_title: 《最后生还者2》多人模式以PvP Mod形式回归，年内推出
subtitle: PC玩家狂喜
opus_summary: 《最后生还者2》多人模式被取消后，Mod作者Speclizer正在制作一款PvP Mod，包含匹配、地图和装备选择，预计今年9月登陆PC。

paragraphs.en: Naughty Dog may have canceled its The Last of Us Part 2 multiplayer project , but Factions fans can now at least have a new PvP mode to look forward to… if they're on PC.
paragraphs.cn: 顽皮狗可能已经取消了《最后生还者2》的多人游戏项目，但派系（Factions）模式的粉丝现在至少能期待一个新的PvP模式了……前提是他们在PC上。

paragraphs.en: Modder Speclizer uploaded 25 minutes of early gameplay for a mod they're working on that will let players go head-to-head as Abby, Ellie, and potentially other characters from the PlayStation video game series. The video kicks off with the news that, after starting development in January 2026, it's expected to launch this September.
paragraphs.cn: Mod制作者Speclizer上传了一段25分钟长的Mod早期实机演示，他们制作的这个Mod将让玩家扮演艾比、艾莉以及该PlayStation游戏系列中的其他角色进行对抗。视频开头宣布，该Mod自2026年1月开始开发，预计今年9月上线。

paragraphs.en: It's admittedly a bit rough around the edges in its current state but, so far, this The Last of Us Part 2 multiplayer mod seems to feature a relatively fleshed-out PvP mode. The earliest moments of the gameplay video are the most telling, highlighting a matchmaking system, maps, and loadout selections. Is it exactly what Naughty Dog may have had planned for The Last of Us Online? Probably not, and it's only coming to PC for now, but it might just help fill the hole in players' hearts.
paragraphs.cn: 目前这个Mod还不算特别完善，但到目前为止，这款《最后生还者2》多人Mod似乎已拥有一个相对完整的PvP模式。实机演示的开头几分钟最能说明问题，展示了匹配系统、地图和装备选择。这和顽皮狗为《最后生还者Online》设想的计划是否完全一致？大概不是，而且目前仅登陆PC，但或许能填补玩家心中的空白。

paragraphs.en: Those itching for a multiplayer spin on a classic post-apocalyptic story might also find some hints of what's to come on Speclizer's X/Twitter account . In the months since development began, they've regularly posted updates on their progress.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你一直想在经典末世题材中体验多人玩法，可以在Speclizer的X账号上找到一些未来的动向线索。自开发启动以来，他们定期发布进度更新。

paragraphs.en: One June 13 video , for example, features footage of school, Seattle, and gas station maps. A May update showed how their first 1v1 match played out. Other videos also show that the modder has seemingly toyed with the idea of including other playable characters (like Dina) and costumes (like Ellie's spacesuit) .
paragraphs.cn: 例如，6月13日发布的一段视频就展示了学校、西雅图和加油站等地图的画面。5月的一次更新则展示了首场1v1对战的实况。其他视频还显示，Speclizer似乎考虑加入其他可玩角色（如蒂娜）和服装（如艾莉的太空服）。

paragraphs.en: It's hard to say what will end up in the mod as Speclizer continues chipping away at it. For now, it at least looks like The Last of Us fans looking to revisit Naughty Dog's critically acclaimed gameplay might have something to keep them occupied this September.
paragraphs.cn: 随着Speclizer不断打磨，最终Mod会包含哪些内容还很难说。不过目前来看，至少那些想重温顽皮狗备受赞誉的《最后生还者》玩法的粉丝，今年9月或许有事可做了。

paragraphs.en: The PlayStation studio canceled its long-gestating multiplayer off-shoot in late 2023, promising to shift its focus to single-player games going forward. Its last all-new story, The Last of Us Part 2 , launched almost exactly six years ago in June 2020. Its next, Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet , remains without a release date.
paragraphs.cn: 这家PlayStation工作室在2023年底取消了酝酿已久的多人模式衍生作，并承诺今后将专注于单机游戏。其上一部完全原创的作品《最后生还者2》在差不多六年前的2020年6月推出。下一部《星际：异端先知》至今尚未公布发售日期。

paragraphs.en: "In ramping up to full production, the massive scope of our ambition became clear," Naughty Dog said at the time of The Last of Us Online's cancelation. "To release and support The Last of Us Online we’d have to put all our studio resources behind supporting post launch content for years to come, severely impacting development on future single-player games. So, we had two paths in front of us: become a solely live service games studio or continue to focus on single-player narrative games that have defined Naughty Dog’s heritage."
paragraphs.cn: 「在进入全面制作阶段后，我们宏伟抱负的庞大工作量变得清晰起来。」顽皮狗在宣布取消《最后生还者Online》时说道，「要发行并支持《最后生还者Online》，我们必须投入所有工作室资源来维护持续多年的后续内容，这会严重影响未来单机游戏的开发。所以我们面前有两条路：成为一家纯服务型游戏工作室，或是继续专注于定义顽皮狗传承的单人剧情游戏。」

paragraphs.en: While Speclizer works to fill the void, we may never know what the PlayStation studio had planned for its evolution on the multiplayer 'Factions' mode delivered with the original The Last of Us. Former Sony Interactive Entertainment executive Shuhei Yoshida said last year that the version of the game he was aware of was "great." Vinit Agarwal, who at one time served as director for The Last of Us Part 2's multiplayer spin-off, said earlier this year that it was nearly 80% complete at the time of its cancelation .
paragraphs.cn: 在Speclizer努力填补空白的同时，我们可能永远无法得知这家PlayStation工作室原计划如何对《最后生还者》初代附带的多人「派系」模式进行迭代。前索尼互动娱乐高管吉田修平去年表示，他所了解的那个版本「非常棒」。曾担任《最后生还者2》多人衍生作导演的Vinit Agarwal今年早些时候透露，项目取消时已接近完成80%。
